title: Nested Merge tables cause an infinite loop in rel_optimizer
poc: ALTER TABLE test1 ADD TABLE test2;
ALTER TABLE test2 ADD TABLE test1;
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test1 (a INT, b VARCHAR(50), c DATE);
CREATE TABLE test2 (x FLOAT, y BOOLEAN, z TIMESTAMP);
ALTER TABLE test1 ADD TABLE test2;
INSERT INTO test1 (a, b, c) VALUES (1, 'test', '2023-10-01');
SELECT a, b FROM test1 WHERE a IS NOT NULL;
